title: Bhawānīpur Rājdhām Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhawānīpur Rājdhām with a Z-Score of +4.09. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave has reached a critical level, with a Z-Score of +4.09 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The temperature is extremely high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 13.3 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 75% and the wind speed is 11.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implementation of heat wave mitigation measures is critical at this time.
